type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Increase in emissions is from more accurate fuel volumes for stationary diesel combustion equipment. 
Prior to 2019, site assumed that a fixed percentage of  bulk diesel fuel volume (which included mobile diesel fuel volumes) as stationary diesel volumes 
In 2019, site started collecting stationary equipment specific data which was found to more than the fuel volumes used in the previous years.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Emissions are calculated based on fuel volume for 2019 reporting ; our previous methodology used number of operating hours which is more conservative than when using fuel volume.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Measured fugitives used to be considered part of VOC emissions; however fugitive emissions constitute mostly methane which is a non-VOC substance. Thus the VOC estimation decreased for 2009

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Facility was shutdown from Jan 1st - May 1st  after the fire event in December 2019, which decreased combustion emissions related to production. However overall emissions increased from start up operations as part of the fire rebuild activities

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: 2021 there was less diesel combustion on site from stationary equipment compared to 2020. In 2020 there was a fire causing the need for more Diesel powered stationary equipment.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: In 2021 there was no major upsets, whereas 2020 saw reduced emissions due to low equipment  usage as a result of  facility shutdown from fire/repair.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: In 2023, there was only one spill event that contained ethylene glycol due to a mechanical seal leak and in 2024, there were 5 events where ethylene glycol was spilled due to primary heavy oil production  and primary production and storage.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: In 2023, there was only one spill event that contained ethylene glycol due to a mechanical seal leak and in 2024, there were 5 events where ethylene glycol was spilled due to primary heavy oil production  and primary production and storage.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: 2024 had higher Toluene values from fugitive emissions. In 2024 there were more leaks (37) compared to 2023 (27) and 2024 had a higher leak rate compared to 2023.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: 2024 had lime sludge that contained toluene while 2023 did not.

type.fr: Nature des autres rejets non ponctuels

comments.comment: Comes from Diesel Engines and Propane Heaters

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: 2024 had higher xylene (all isomer) values from fugitive emissions. In 2024 there were more leaks (37) compared to 2023 (27) and 2024 had a higher leak rate compared to 2023.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: Back in 2023, the MacKay River site disposed all quantity at an on-site landfill but in 2024, MacKay river sent some off-site to a landfill and also off-site for incarnation with less quantity
